name: prmetrics
description: Augments pull request titles to let reviewers quickly determine PR size and test coverage.

scripts.build:debug: npm run build:initialization:debug && cd debug/task && tsc --sourceMap
scripts.build:release: npm run build:initialization:release && cd release/task && tsc && ncc build index.js --out . --minify && node -e "const f=require('fs');f.cpSync('index.js','index.mjs');['src','tests','typedocs','index.js','index.ts','package.json','tsconfig.json','typedoc.json'].forEach(p=>f.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}))" && cd .. && node -e "const f=require('fs');f.mkdirSync('extension',{recursive:true});f.cpSync('../package.json','extension/package.json')"
scripts.build:package: npm ci && ncc build src/task/index.ts --out dist --minify && node -e "const f=require('fs');f.cpSync('dist/index.js','dist/index.mjs');f.rmSync('dist/index.js',{force:true});f.rmSync('dist/package.json',{force:true});f.cpSync('src/task/Strings/resources.resjson/en-US/resources.resjson','dist/resources.resjson')"
scripts.build: npm run build:release && npm run build:package && npm run build:docs
scripts.deploy: npm run build:release && (tfx build tasks delete --task-id 907d3b28-6b37-4ac7-ac75-9631ee53e512 --no-prompt || true) && tfx build tasks upload --task-path release/task --no-prompt
scripts.test: npm run build:debug && cd debug/task && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary mocha tests/**/*.spec.js
scripts.test:fast: node -e "const f=require('fs');f.mkdirSync('debug',{recursive:true});f.cpSync('src','debug',{recursive:true})" && cd debug/task && tsc --sourceMap && c8 --reporter=text --reporter=text-summary mocha tests/**/*.spec.js

author: Microsoft Corporation
